Galactic Marketplace UI Update,Hey everyone! We’ve rolled out some improvements to https://play.staratlas.com/market/

Here's what's new:
Redesigned marketplace item cards,Overhauled category side menu,Combined item orders and details into a single page,Enhanced gallery UI/UX,
Check it out!
